speaker: Gabrielle
content: So now you're taking Julie on your dinner date with Mike?

speaker: Susan
content: Yeah, Well, if Eddie is gonna be there, I'm gonna need emotional support.
mark: emotional support 情感支持 emotional adj. 情感的，情绪的

speaker: Gabrielle
content: I can't believe she wormed her way in. How did you let her do that?
mark: worm one's way in 像虫子一样蜿蜒前行、蠕动着进入，常引申为慢慢地、巧妙地或不择手段地渗入、钻进、混入
worm n. 蠕虫；幼虫  v. 蠕动，曲折行进

speaker: Susan
content: I don't know, I was gonna take her out at the knees, but it all happened so fast.
mark: take sb out at the knees 从膝盖处把她弄倒; 用来表示（通过某种手段）使某人失去能力、削弱某人的优势、击败或挫败某人

speaker: Gabrielle
content: Well, you know what you need to do. You need to get there early, spend a little time with Mike before the little barracuda gets there.
mark: barracuda n. 梭鱼类，是一种凶猛的食肉鱼，以其攻击性和快速游动而闻名。

speaker: Susan
content: That's a good idea. Eddie will get there at 5:45, which means her breasts will arrive at 5:30, so I should shoot for 5:00.
mark: breast n. 胸部，胸脯；内心 v. 登上……的顶部；挺胸顶着……；迎……而上
shoot for 尽力去做某事 shoot v. 开（枪），射击
I should shoot for 5:00. 我应该争取5点到。

speaker: Gabrielle
content: That a girl. I'm just gonna take these upstairs.
mark: That a girl. 鼓励或赞扬女性的行为或成就。翻译为“好样的”或“这才是好女孩”
upstairs adv. 往楼上，在楼上；脑力上，精神上

speaker: Susan
content: I'm gonna keep my one little bag and go home. That is a beautiful rose, Where did you get it.

speaker: Gabrielle
content: Oh, John gave it to me.

speaker: Susan
content: John? Your gardener, he gave you a rose?

speaker: Gabrielle
content: Yes, I am having some new bushes planted outside, and he gave me that as a color palette.
mark: palette n. 调色板；选项板；一组音调，音色

speaker: Susan
content: Oh, OK, sure is beautiful, isn't it?
mark: sure is beautiful 确实很美。完整的句子It sure is beautiful,省略了主语it。
certainly是纯粹的副词，主要用来修饰动词、形容词、副词或整个句子， 放在句首、系动词前或形容词前等位置都比较常见。
It certainly is beautiful = It is certainly beautiful = Certainly it is beautiful
sure 既可以作形容词，也可以作副词。当它作副词时，常用来替代certainly等词加强语气，通常放在系动词之前。而放在be动词后面容易被理解为形容词，放在句首容易被理解成”当然”的意思，从而引起混淆和误解。
所以It sure is beautiful 确不能替换成另外两种写法。
